hero.title: Find the perfect plan for your event
hero.subtitle: CulturePass provides fair, transparent pricing for cultural organisers and attendees — with Stripe-backed payouts, wallet passes, and diaspora discovery built in.

tiers.name: Free Tickets
tiers.description: Ideal for community meetups, open rehearsals, and cultural gatherings with no admission charge.

tiers.name: Premium
tiers.description: Full HostSpace toolkit, priority support, and advanced promotion for high-impact cultural programs.

tiers.name: Standard
tiers.description: Everything you need to sell tickets, manage guests, and grow your cultural audience on CulturePass.

tiers.name: NGO & Enterprise
tiers.description: Tailored pricing, governance workflows, and partnership support for institutions thinking at scale.

passFeeNote: Don't want organiser fees? Pass the platform fee to attendees at checkout — you keep your full ticket revenue.

benefits.title: Secured payment gateway
benefits.body: Stripe powers every checkout — secure, reliable card payments from any device, with automated splits and organiser payouts.

benefits.title: Full support guaranteed
benefits.body: From your first listing to doors open. Whether this is your first online event or your hundredth festival season, our team guides you end to end.

benefits.title: Save time & money
benefits.body: Replace paper tickets and manual spreadsheets with automated RSVPs, wallet passes, and real-time sales — built for cultural organisers.

footnotes: Standard and Premium ticket fees are loaded live from Stripe Connect (STRIPE_CONNECT_PLATFORM_FEE_BPS). Premium is 2.5 percentage points below Standard.
Card processing fees from Stripe apply in addition to CulturePass platform fees on paid tickets.
New community hosts may qualify for 0% platform fees on their first events — ask our team.
CulturePass+ membership is separate — see /membership/upgrade for attendee perks.
